join_path: fork → add cave/cubbies/<login>/ → open PR (or just pull, no membership required to read)

members.notes: Operator seat. Maintains the cave, merges cubby PRs. No gatekeeping — PRs that add a well-formed cubby under cave/cubbies/<login>/ are welcome from anyone.

reconciliation.notes: Membership is open and additive. A member is anyone with a cubby under cave/cubbies/<login>/ on main. members.json is the protocol-layer mirror; the cubbies/ directory listing is the ground truth. No emails or PII are stored here — public roster only.
